nodes.name: buildhmckernelfromlogdensityoracle
nodes.description: Creates a pure Hamiltonian Monte Carlo transition kernel from a provided target log-density oracle, with stochasticity and chain state threaded explicitly.
nodes.type_signature: (target_log_kernel: log-density oracle) -> Hamiltonian Monte Carlo transition kernel
nodes.conceptual_summary: Direct callable atom in the consolidated module.
nodes.critic_notes: Signature derived from the Python wrapper definition.
